description_long: This rifle features a modern, compact bullpup design with a predominantly black and gray color scheme accented by red markings. The stock is skeletonized and integrated into the main body, providing a lightweight yet sturdy structure. The rifle has a short, standard barrel protruding from the front, and a detachable box magazine located behind the pistol grip, characteristic of bullpup configurations. A rectangular optical sight is mounted on the top rail, suggesting enhanced aiming capabilities. The trigger guard is large and angular, and the grip is ergonomically shaped for comfortable handling. The overall construction appears to be a mix of metal and polymer materials, giving it a sleek, tactical appearance suitable for urban environments.
description: A compact, modern bullpup rifle with a skeletonized stock, short barrel, and mounted optical sight, finished in black, gray, and red accents. Its design is sleek and tactical, with ergonomic features and a detachable magazine.
description_view_0: Side view showing the skeletonized stock, pistol grip, optical sight, and red accent details on the main body.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the narrow barrel profile and the compact width of the rifle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the bullpup configuration, magazine placement, and additional red markings.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the stock's structure and the alignment of the sight and barrel.
